title: GAGA Descent — Full Faithfulness and Algebraization

analysis.object: T773: GAGA Descent — Full Faithfulness and Algebraization depth analysis

serre_gaga_recap.description: Serre GAGA: algebraic and analytic coincide for projective over C

grothendieck_formal_gaga.description: Grothendieck formal GAGA: proper formal scheme = algebraizable

berkovich_gaga_cycles.description: Does Berkovich GAGA extend to cycles? Analytic cycle in X^{an} -> algebraic in X?
berkovich_gaga_cycles.reason: This is T759 -- same as Hodge

gaga_for_divisors.description: Cycle GAGA proved for divisors: Cartier divisors algebraize (classical)

gaga_for_higher_codim.description: Codim >= 2: Cycle GAGA = Hodge descent = formal GAGA for cycles

formal_gaga_for_cycles.description: Grothendieck formal GAGA works for coherent sheaves -- NOT arbitrary cycles
formal_gaga_for_cycles.reason: Cycles are not just coherent sheaves -- cycle-specific GAGA needed

t773_result.description: T773: Grothendieck formal GAGA closes the descent gap for COHERENT SHEAVES. For CYCLES (codim >= 2), a cycle-specific formal GAGA is needed. This is the minimal remaining gap.
t773_result.reason: Gap refined: only cycle formal GAGA in codim >= 2 remains

analysis.theorem: T773: GAGA Descent — Full Faithfulness and Algebraization (S1052).

key_theorem: T773: GAGA Descent — Full Faithfulness and Algebraization (S1052).
